title: Dynamic Island
description: An UI-Element with clean animations, smart notifications and flexible HUD customization.
body:
![MainLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42028f371245ff70bef565d6ad84acb56cc6def.png)

This mod adds a dynamic island-style UI element to Minecraft that sits at the top of your screen and reacts to what’s going on in-game.

It shows notifications, status changes and other small updates in a compact way, without filling up your whole HUD. Everything fades in and out smoothly, so it feels natural while playing instead of distracting.

You can tweak how it looks and behaves, move it around and choose what it shows. It’s meant to fit into your setup.
